Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Akura Grace]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 7''' — Akura Grace is an Underlord candidate for the Akura team.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 7''' — Akura Grace has mastered her sword and shadow Path.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 7''' — Akura Grace is a young Akura Underlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 7''' — Akura Grace uses a lightly curved saber as her weapon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 7''' — Akura Grace's bodies are remade in soulfire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 8''' — Akura Grace is an Underlord in the Akura clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 10''' — Akura Grace leads the Akura backup team.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 15''' — Akura Grace was eliminated during the second round.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 10''' — Akura Grace carries a curving single-edged sword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — Lindon exchanged nods with Akura Grace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Akura Grace was found dead, pinned to a wall by a Forged spear.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 3''' — Akura Grace was a warrior and an Underlady.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
